title: Reverse Proxy Hosts Config
description: Host-to-upstream mappings for the reverse proxy runtime.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint for the local JSON schema file.

mode.description: Routing mode for the host. Defaults to http-proxy when omitted.

protocol.description: Upstream protocol used by http-proxy targets.

upstreamHost.description: Optional hostname used for the upstream Host header and HTTPS SNI when proxying through a different connect address.

connectTimeoutMs.description: Optional per-target connect timeout override in milliseconds.

upstreamTimeoutMs.description: Optional per-target idle timeout override in milliseconds.
